specific_question: What was the agent time wasted due to customers repeating information in Q4 2025 at Lee's Market?
answer: In Q4 2025, Lee's Market's average time agents spent gathering basic, repeated customer context was 1.8 minutes per call, representing 17% of the average call duration for escalated tickets.
justification: Implementing a unified Customer Data Platform (CDP) by Q2 2026 is projected to save 1.1 minutes per call, translating to an estimated annual labor cost reduction of $75,000 in the contact center.
dr_question: Considering companies achieve superior financial results by focusing on enhancing the experience of existing customers, what CS service improvements could be implemented by 2026 to make customers feel more recognized and valued during interactions?
